name: account.google
title: Account:Google
description: The declaration to configure a Google account.

payload.content: A Google configuration defines a Google account for a user. The user will be prompted to enter their credentials shortly after the configuration successfully installs.

payloadkeys.title: Account Name
payloadkeys.content: The name that apps show to the user for this Google account. If not present, the system generates a suitable default.

payloadkeys.title: User Identity Asset Reference
payloadkeys.content: The identifier of an asset declaration that contains the user identity for this Google account. Set the corresponding asset type to `UserIdentity` and ensure that it contains an `EmailAddress` key that specifies the full Google email address for the account.
